constructor.details: Constructor is left empty and init is used instead

getBridge().details: Used for beaming holographable assets cross-chain

params.chainId: the Holograph ChainId to get gas parameters for, set to 0 for default

getInterfaces().details: Holograph uses this contract to store data that needs to be accessed by a large portion of the modules

getLZEndpoint().details: All lzReceive function calls allow only requests from this address

getOperator().details: All cross-chain Holograph Bridge beams are handled by the Holograph Operator module

getOptimismGasPriceOracle().details: Allows to properly calculate the L1 security fee for Optimism bridge transactions

init(bytes).details: This function is called by the deployer/factory when creating a contract

params.initPayload: abi encoded payload to use for contract initilaization

lzReceive(uint16,bytes,uint64,bytes).details: This function only allows calls from the configured LayerZero endpoint address

send(uint256,uint256,uint32,address,uint.details: Need to add an extra function to get LZ gas amount needed for their internal cross-chain message verification

params.bridge: address of the Holograph Bridge smart contract to use

params.chainId: the Holograph ChainId to set gas parameters for, set to 0 for default
params.gasParameters: struct of all the gas parameters to set

params.chainIds: array of Holograph ChainId to set gas parameters for
params.gasParameters: array of all the gas parameters to set

params.interfaces: address of the Holograph Interfaces smart contract to use

params.lZEndpoint: address of the LayerZero Endpoint to use

params.operator: address of the Holograph Operator smart contract to use

params.optimismGasPriceOracle: address of the Optimism Gas Price Oracle smart contract to use

getBridge().notice: Get the address of the Holograph Bridge module

getGasParameters(uint32).notice: Get the default or chain-specific GasParameters

getInterfaces().notice: Get the address of the Holograph Interfaces module

getLZEndpoint().notice: Get the address of the approved LayerZero Endpoint

getOperator().notice: Get the address of the Holograph Operator module

getOptimismGasPriceOracle().notice: Get the address of the Optimism Gas Price Oracle module

init(bytes).notice: Used internally to initialize the contract instead of through a constructor

setBridge(address).notice: Update the Holograph Bridge module address

setGasParameters(uint32,(uint256,uint256.notice: Update the default or chain-specific GasParameters

setGasParameters(uint32[],(uint256,uint2.notice: Update the default or chain-specific GasParameters

setInterfaces(address).notice: Update the Holograph Interfaces module address

setLZEndpoint(address).notice: Update the approved LayerZero Endpoint address

setOperator(address).notice: Update the Holograph Operator module address

setOptimismGasPriceOracle(address).notice: Update the Optimism Gas Price Oracle module address
